search_queries_used: site:rcem.ac.uk management investigation results emergency department February 2023 radiology report review action
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic diagnosis, investigation, treatment, medication, dose, procedure, referral, escalation, or discharge instructions
search snippets, landing pages, and broad source-family matches without an exact applicable section
rejection_reasons: The template cannot interpret an image or report.
Management depends on the actual report and clinical context.
Autonomous clinical output is outside this documentation-only research programme and was not mapped.
Only opened exact official documents and directly applicable sections were accepted as evidence.
population_applicability: Adults or children whose ED-requested imaging report is reviewed; applicability depends on modality, anatomy and presentation.
setting_applicability: Emergency department radiology-report review, communication, responsibility and follow-up.
UAE_applicability: Documentation principles transfer, but UAE radiology reporting, critical-result, contact, referral and duty-of-candour policies apply.
recency_verification: The current RCEM February 2023 revision was reviewed on 2026-07-14.
superseded_check: The February 2023 RCEM version supersedes the 2020 revision and is current.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact RCEM radiology-results section supports documenting the reason for review, report source or date, and the imaging report already performed, without interpreting it.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports a traceable record of review, action, responsibility, referral and handover for pathology and radiology results.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact review-action section supports recording clinician review, a clinician-entered plan, specialist discussion and arranged handover or follow-up only when completed.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documenting the specific test, reviewed result or report, communication and clinician-determined follow-up action.

unresolved_source_gaps: Modality, body part, report text, comparison, clinician interpretation, urgency, diagnosis, communication attempts, treatment, referral and timing remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
